textAboutIntroduction: Learn more about me through this page!
textAlwaysOpenExternalLinksInANewTab: Always open external links in a new tab
textArtworksAndVideosIntroduction: Welcome to view my personal artworks and videos through other platforms!
textBlogsAndSponsorIntroduction: Welcome to read my blogs about me or my projects!
textChattingIntroduction: Welcome to join my chat room for interaction!

textIntroduction1: You might know me through my artworks and videos. You can view my more artworks from my Pixiv profile or my profile on other platforms.
textIntroduction2: You might also know me through softwares I made (such as Quanto Series). You can check my GitHub profile to view open source projects, or go to the Softwares page to see more.
textIntroduction3: I'm an amateur creator. I draw something, make video, and code sometimes.
textOpenToolTip1: You may need to open this link in WeChat, and you can choose to copy the link into WeChat or scan the QR code.
textProfilePart1: Pronunciation: /stiːv ɕy/. You can also call me "什五 (shí wǔ, ㄕˊ ㄨˇ or ジュウゴ)".
textProfilePart2: I'm an amateur creator. I draw something and make video sometimes.
textProfilePart4: I want to create more, code more and sleep more.
textQuantoSeriesDescription: Quanto Series is a collaboration of open source projects named starting with Quanto, which are desktop customization tools based on Rainmeter.
textQuantumIntroduction: Quanto Series product updates and feedback channels, discussion group for desktop customization enthusiasts
